input:
{"prompt":"Wide-angle camera positioned at ground level, slightly tilted upward to capture full body and sky. Scene opens [reference_image: first_frame] with athletic male in his twenties standing confidently at outdoor sports ground, wearing distinctive bright pants exactly as shown in reference image – vibrant color, fitted athletic cut, bold branding visible. Background: urban playground with metal bars, rubber surface, golden hour lighting casting long shadows, warm orange glow on equipment. High contrast, saturated colors for viral appeal.

0–3s: Athlete stands center frame, catches breath after previous move, adjusts stance. Camera holds steady. Голос за кадром: «Смотрите, что я могу в этих штанах от ХитКлаб!» Ambient street sounds, distant city hum.

3–6s: Explosive movement begins – athlete sprints three steps forward, camera follows with smooth tracking motion. He launches into powerful backflip (salto), body rotating cleanly against bright blue sky. Slow-motion applied at peak rotation. Pants fabric stretches naturally, showcasing flexibility. Dramatic whoosh sound effect. Sunlight creates lens flare at apex.

6–10s: Athlete lands perfectly on both feet, arms raised in victory pose, huge confident smile. Camera pushes in slightly tighter. Голос за кадром продолжает: «И вы сможете так!» Quick zoom on pants branding. Upbeat electronic music drop hits. Text overlay appears in English: "HITCLUB PANTS" with fire emoji. Energy, triumph, aspirational mood. Viral hook: impressive athletic feat + relatable product promise.","resolution":"720p","aspect_ratio":"9:16","duration":"10","nsfw_checker":true}

{"prompt":"Animated cartoon style, vibrant colors, stylized characters, smooth 2D animation

0–3s: [reference_image: first_frame] Camera whip pans across cartoon-rendered premium white and colored socks laid out on stylized minimalist concrete surface, exaggerated fabric texture with bold outlines and cel-shaded ribbed details, graphic directional sunlight casting sharp geometric cartoon shadows, extreme close-up revealing animated cotton weave patterns with hand-drawn aesthetic

3–7s: Rapid jump cuts between dynamic cartoon angles: socks being pulled onto illustrated athletic legs with exaggerated motion lines and speed blur effects, animated feet stomping in rhythm creating bouncy visual beat with impact stars, low-angle dolly push toward spinning 2D product display with flat color blocking, neon accent lighting strobing across AMEZA logo embroidery in bold vector style, stylized urban rooftop background with simplified city skyline silhouettes

7–11s: Chaotic energy cartoon montage: socks in mid-air freeze frame with explosive particle effects radiating outward in bright colors, 360-degree arc around character's legs in oversized stylized sneakers with thick black outlines, rack focus between foreground sock details and background street culture elements rendered in flat graphic style, whip pan transitions with animated speed lines synced to beat, vibrant color grading shifting from cool blues to warm oranges with high saturation

11–15s: [reference_image: last_frame] Camera crane down to final hero shot of AMEZA logo prominently displayed in bold typography, all product variations arranged in satisfying grid pattern with cartoon rendering, slow-motion dolly zoom creating hypnotic depth with radiating background lines, clean minimalist aesthetic with animated premium brand typography overlaying frame, golden hour rim lighting creating glowing halo effect around products with soft gradient aura

Audio: Punchy hip-hop beat with heavy bass drops, cartoon sneaker squeaks and fabric swish SFX with playful boings, rhythmic clapping synced to cuts, sudden silence before final product reveal with soft ambient whoosh","resolution":"480p","aspect_ratio":"9:16","duration":"15","nsfw_checker":true}

{"prompt":"Fast-cut viral social media video, high-energy multi-shot, trending aesthetic, dopamine-paced editing

0–3s: [reference_image: first_frame] Camera whip pans across premium white and colored socks laid out on minimalist concrete surface, sharp focus on fabric texture and ribbed details, harsh directional sunlight casting geometric shadows, extreme close-up macro shot revealing cotton weave quality

3–7s: Rapid jump cuts between dynamic angles: socks being pulled onto athletic legs in explosive motion blur, feet stomping in rhythm creating visual beat, low-angle dolly push toward rotating product display, neon accent lighting strobing across AMEZA logo embroidery, urban rooftop background with city skyline bokeh

7–11s: Chaotic energy montage: socks in mid-air freeze frame with particles exploding outward, 360-degree arc around model's legs in stylized sneakers, rack focus between foreground sock details and background street culture elements, whip pan transitions synced to bass drops, vibrant color grading shifting from cool blues to warm oranges

11–15s: [reference_image: last_frame] Camera crane down to final hero shot of AMEZA logo prominently displayed, all product variations arranged in satisfying grid pattern, slow-motion dolly zoom creating hypnotic depth, clean minimalist aesthetic with premium brand typography overlaying frame, golden hour rim lighting creating halo effect around products

Audio: Punchy hip-hop beat with heavy bass drops, sneaker squeaks and fabric swish SFX, rhythmic clapping synced to cuts, sudden silence before final product reveal with ambient room tone

photorealistic, 35mm film grain, ARRI ALEXA aesthetic, no 3D, no cartoon, commercial product photography lighting, Instagram Reels trending style, Gen-Z viral editing rhythm","resolution":"480p","aspect_ratio":"9:16","duration":"15","nsfw_checker":true}

{"prompt":"Montage, multi-shot Hollywood production, don't use one angle, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, 35mm film, ARRI ALEXA aesthetic

0–3s: Extreme close-up rack focus on a smartphone screen displaying a marketplace product card with low views and zero sales, dramatic shallow depth of field, cold blue-tinted lighting suggesting failure, slow push-in on screen revealing frustrated seller's reflection in glass, glossy screen texture catching overhead fluorescent light

3–7s: Dynamic whip pan transition to confident entrepreneur Rahim Tanzharikov in modern minimalist office, warm golden hour lighting streaming through floor-to-ceiling windows, medium shot dollying right as he gestures toward large wall-mounted monitor displaying analytics dashboard with skyrocketing green graphs and conversion metrics, professional attire, charismatic smile, glass desk surface reflecting colorful marketplace interface

7–11s: Fast-paced montage of marketplace success indicators: close-up dolly shot of smartphone notifications exploding with order alerts, overhead crane shot descending on laptop keyboard where fingers type rapidly, arc shot around tablet showing product card climbing to top search positions with verified badges and five-star reviews appearing, vibrant marketplace brand colors dominating screen, bokeh light particles suggesting digital magic

11–15s: Wide establishing shot pulling back from Rahim's confident portrait against sleek office backdrop with cityscape visible through windows at dusk, he extends hand toward camera in welcoming gesture, foreground overlay of floating holographic marketplace product cards rotating in 3D space with "PROMOTED" tags, warm amber and teal color grading, lens flares from practical office lighting creating premium aesthetic, final frame holds on contact information overlay with elegant typography

Audio: Upbeat modern corporate electronic music with confident piano melody, subtle whoosh transitions between cuts, notification ping sound effects during order alerts sequence, ambient office atmosphere with distant keyboard clicks, rising orchestral swell building to powerful resolution, professional male voiceover describing marketplace promotion service benefits in Russian accent

photorealistic, 35mm film grain, ARRI ALEXA aesthetic, no 3D, no cartoon","resolution":"480p","aspect_ratio":"9:16","duration":"15","nsfw_checker":true}

{"prompt":"Opening wide shot of a modern minimalist home office, soft afternoon sunlight streaming through sheer white curtains creating gentle lens flare and warm diffused lighting across the space. A young female entrepreneur, 28–32 years old, sits at a sleek white lacquered desk with a silver laptop, wearing a casual beige linen blazer over a white silk blouse. The desk features a single small potted succulent in a white ceramic pot and a smartphone with rose gold casing. Camera begins with a slow, smooth push-in from medium shot to close-up over the first three seconds. Warm color palette dominated by whites, beiges, soft golds, and cream tones. Clean, aspirational atmosphere with shallow depth of field creating soft bokeh in background. Shot on cinema camera with 35mm lens, f/2.8 aperture.

**0–3s:** Establish scene — Woman looks slightly frustrated at laptop screen displaying a Wildberries product card with visible low view count numbers and declining sales metrics in red. She sighs softly, touches her temple with two fingers showing mild stress. Soft ambient electronic music begins, gentle pads with hopeful melodic progression. Natural breathing sounds, subtle fabric rustle.

**3–6s:** Main action — Her smartphone screen lights up with a bright notification glow. She picks it up with both hands, face immediately brightening with relief. Camera cuts sharply to extreme close-up of phone screen showing a sleek app interface with animated rising line graphs in purple and pink gradients, colorful bar charts expanding upward, and the recognizable Wildberries logo. Smooth motion graphics overlay showing a product card image "climbing" through search ranking positions with glowing upward arrows, particle effects, and radiant purple-to-pink gradient accents. Голос за кадром: «Ваша карточка — на первых позициях. Продвижение на Wildberries стало простым.» Interface elements animate with smooth ease-in-out transitions.

**6–10s:** Climax and payoff — Cut back to woman's face in medium close-up, now beaming with genuine confidence and satisfaction, eyes bright. Laptop screen now displays significantly higher sales numbers in green with multiple notification pop-ups appearing with subtle ping sounds. Camera pulls back slightly revealing full desk setup. She raises a white ceramic coffee mug in a small celebratory toast gesture toward camera. Clean white sans-serif text overlay appears center-screen with subtle fade-in: "RANK HIGHER. SELL MORE." Final frame transitions to professional logo lockup for promotion service with website URL in bottom third, clean typography. Голос за кадром: «Доверьте продвижение профессионалам.» Music swells to uplifting major chord conclusion with bright synth leads. Bright, optimistic, empowering mood throughout final seconds with warm golden hour lighting intensifying.","resolution":"720p","aspect_ratio":"9:16","duration":"10","nsfw_checker":true}

{"prompt":"[reference_image: first_frame] Opening wide-angle shot from slightly above, capturing a minimalist modern living room bathed in soft morning sunlight streaming through sheer white curtains. Warm golden light creates gentle highlights on pale oak flooring. A pair of vibrant Ameza socks in bold geometric patterns—deep teal, burnt orange, and cream stripes—lies artfully placed on a clean white surface beside a steaming ceramic mug and an open book. The composition feels effortless, aspirational, cozy. Shallow depth of field keeps focus on the socks while background softly blurs.

0–3s: Camera slowly pushes in toward the socks, revealing intricate knit texture and premium fabric sheen. Light dances across the woven patterns. A human hand enters frame from the right, fingers gently reaching for the socks with natural, unhurried movement.

3–6s: Cut to close-up: hands pulling on the first Ameza sock in smooth, satisfying motion. The fabric stretches elegantly, hugging the foot perfectly. Camera circles 90 degrees to capture the profile, emphasizing comfort and fit. Second sock follows with same deliberate care. Warm color grading enhances the inviting atmosphere. Subtle text overlay appears: "Ameza – Comfort Reimagined" in clean sans-serif font, lower third.

6–10s: [reference_image: last_frame] Camera pulls back to reveal full scene: person now standing confidently in complete casual outfit, Ameza socks prominently visible, feet planted on the sunlit floor. They take one relaxed step forward, socks flexing naturally. Final frame shows brand logo "AMEZA" materializing center screen in bold, modern typography with tagline beneath: "Step into Quality." Atmosphere is aspirational yet authentic, mood serene and confident.","resolution":"720p","aspect_ratio":"9:16","duration":"10","nsfw_checker":true}
